291:3285.name: ui/u x , design systems, brand identity, Figma. but the real differentiator is the range. i've shot and edited video, done product photography, built websites, coded addons, launched M VPs, and co-hosted a podcast. i use AI as a tool, not a crutch. and i've been doing all of this professionally and on the side — since 2012

164:4379.name: i have aphantasia. i cannot visualize anything in my mind's eye. for a designer, that sounds like a handicap. but since i never knew there was another way, i learned to approach problems differently than most. no preconceived image to anchor to. no default aesthetic to fall back on. just first principles, every time. it became my superpower.
